MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF SARAH EKSTROM MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

Plaintiff Sarah Ekstrom and the Putative Class's motion to admit counsel pro hac vice, which is unopposed, is GRANTED. Counsel Richard A. Jacobs may appear as counsel pro hac vice for moving parties in this action. Order is signed. Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
